violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (counter under coffee equipment ) have an accumulation of dust and /or dirt. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The (ceilings ) in the (back storage ) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair.Observed missing tiles New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The floors in back storage area under equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and freezer shelving have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
